name: BTC Digital Ltd.
business: BTC Digital Ltd. is a crypto asset technology company focused on bitcoin mining, and also generates revenue through mining machines resale and rental business operations. The company operates 2,021 mining machines with a hash rate of 213 PH/s at a hosting facility in New Tazewell, Tennessee. As of December 31, 2023, it mined 99.7607 bitcoins and generated $2.9 million in mining revenue.

exposures.sentence: we are a crypto asset technology company based in the U.S. with a focus on bitcoin mining.
we also generate revenue through mining machines resale and rental business operations.

Historically, the price of bitcoins has fluctuated significantly.

catalysts.event: Asset purchase agreement for 2,000 T21 Miners
catalysts.sentence: On January 2, 2024 the Company has entered into an asset purchase agreement with BITMAIN TECHNOLOGIES DELAWARE LIMITED to acquire 2,000 units of T21 Miners for $5,320,000.
